arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford has new option as Aston Villa consider £40m transfer clause
arts.sum: Aston Villa have the opportunity to sign Marcus Rashford on a permanent basis this summer transfer window, with the prospect of playing time in the future back at parent club Manchester United slim indeed - but in the event Villa don't pursue a deal, Rashford won't be without interest from elsewhere. Indeed, while he's likely to receive offers to go and play abroad - AC Milan have been linked with a move for the forward, who could join English contingent Fikayo Tomori, Ruben Loftus-Cheek and Tammy Abraham - Rashford is also expected to have an opportunity to remain in the Premier League, even if it isn't at Old Trafford or Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, PSG-Linked Attacker With €75M Release Clause Makes Major Decision While Still on Loan
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been keeping tabs on Victor Osimhen for a while, and with the summer transfer window around the corner, speculation about his next move is starting to pick up. Now at Galatasaray, the Nigerian striker has found his groove again, showing the same kind of form that turned heads during the 2022-23 campaign. arts.ttl: Wednesday’s briefing: Heartbreak for Villa while Bellingham eyes Real fightback
arts.sum: Unai Emery’s side beat Paris St Germain 3-2 in their quarter-final second leg but went out of the Champions League 5-4 on aggregate.

arts.ttl: BBC Pundit Slams Unai Emery for Marcus Rashford Substitution in Aston Villa–PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain lost 3-2 to Aston Villa on Tuesday night at Villa Park in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarterfinal tie, but still advanced to the semifinals with a 5-4 win on aggregate. They’ll now face the winner of the Arsenal–Real Madrid tie. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain lost 3-2 to Aston Villa on Tusday night at Villa Park in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarterfinal, but still moved on to the semifinals with a 5-4 win on aggregate and they await the winner of the Arsenal or Real Madrid tie. arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals his Champions League favourite after Aston Villa’s elimination
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s UEFA Champions League adventure came to an end at the hands of Paris Saint-Germain on Tuesday and Unai Emery has now backed his former club to go on…

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: "We're happy to be in the semi-finals!"
arts.sum: The Paris Saint-Germain coach and Achraf Hakimi spoke to PSG TV after Les Rouge et Bleu qualified against Aston Villa in the Champions League quarter-finals at Villa Park on Tuesday 15 April. "In the second half, we suffered; it was very difficult.

arts.ttl: Highlights, report: Paris hold off Villa
arts.sum: Paris held off a thrilling comeback by their hosts to win their quarter-final 5-4 on aggregate despite a 3-2 second-leg defeat at Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: Semi-bound PSG world's 'best squad'
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique hailed his squad as the best in the world on Tuesday after they reached the Champions League semifinals with a 5-4 aggregate win over Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: PSG’s Luis Enrique on Aston Villa: ‘We have never been dominated so much.’
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were left clinging on against Aston Villa in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarter-final. Pre-match, Luis Enrique said that his PSG side had to be “prepared…
